reviews.author: Dung Tran
reviews.text: The time I went, all the beaches were fenced up along side the coast so you can't go to the beach anymore, quite sad to me but you can go at the nearest beach park in the north way. At there, there was no fenced up.

reviews.author: Sophie
reviews.text: As other reviews said, there was a fence and ladders over to this place the whole way along the beach to various degrees of stability. We drove all the way down to the last shop before the hotel (check the name Quán Không Tên on the map, I believe it's around here). Not only was the strongest looking ladder here, but there was also a short path that actually lead to the beach, just with a bit of loose sand to walk through. We did both, and the ladder is super secure, and slightly quicker to the beach. Regarding the beach, there is trash, but not nearly as much as pictures here from years ago. It seems this is a place where people work and they seem to actively be getting rid of big bits of plastic and such. I wouldn't advise swimming, but only because there are many beaches nicer. You'll find a crazy amount of shells here, though not much variety as some beaches further north that I've seen before, so I wouldn't come here for that if given the choice of nicer beaches. This place is not trying to be a public beach for tourists, so if you are okay with that, I'm sure you'll enjoy the peace from the city.

reviews.author: Nga Truong
reviews.text: amazing sunrise!! in the early morning, you can also see the low tide appx 2km from the beach, there amazing activity that seaman go clamming. Listening their story was amazed me a lot. So many pcs of happy stories surrounding! its peaceful in my little eyes :)

reviews.author: Vincent Oliver
reviews.text: A big disappointment after traveling on the good road to the sea from HCMC. Beach filthy! No facilities, apart from some basic restaurants along the roadside. A real pity that the litter management and discipline is not improved to make this beach area better.

reviews.author: Gemmy Phan
reviews.text: Can Gio beach is near Saigon. The beach is free open for everyone. And we can rent beach couch or hammmock for less than $50 cents.

reviews.author: Misa
reviews.text: You can have nice photos here especially during sunset. However beach is full of trash and water doesn’t seem clear to swim.

reviews.author: [ T ] im
reviews.text: Cần Giờ Beach, unfortunately, leaves much to be desired as a travel destination. It is, sadly, one of the dirtiest beaches I have ever visited. The shoreline is littered with trash, creating an unpleasant and unwelcoming atmosphere for visitors. The sight of cows grazing nearby further detracts from the beach's appeal, giving the area a neglected and unclean impression. To make matters worse, accessing the beach is unnecessarily complicated. A long fence has been built along the shore, and visitors must use stairs to get to the sand, which feels inconvenient and uninviting. While Cần Giờ is known for its surrounding mangroves and seafood offerings, the beach itself is far from the relaxing getaway one might hope for. Unless significant efforts are made to clean and maintain the area, it’s hard to recommend this as a worthwhile destination.

reviews.author: funne My Life
reviews.text: Its one really dirty beach (lots of sea trash, nets, plastic), also the sand is fine and black so the sea looks dirty and is not good for swimming. But you can find bautiful shells there.

reviews.author: Thuận Tăng Anh
reviews.text: Beautiful beach with lots of seafoods comes reasonable prices.

reviews.author: Phuoc BUI Van
reviews.text: No more available. Vin construction working there now

reviews.author: Q (白挪)
reviews.text: Trashes everywhere 🤒. Interesting crab activities. Presence of cows.

reviews.author: hung lu
reviews.text: Too much mud ang dirty, nogood for swimming. Seafood is deliciuos medium price. Please confirm the price before o.rder

reviews.author: Gia Le
reviews.text: The first half of the beach is crowded and people will try to hassle you a lots but a little bit further along the way there will be great. It's empty at night. Great nearby get away location near Sài Gòn

reviews.author: Bảo Trần Đức
reviews.text: Popular with teenagers for its food market, the beach is clean but it has black sand so it looks a bit dirty, great food makes up for the beach tho

reviews.author: unegoist (unegoist)
reviews.text: Yes, there is trash here, but maybe enjoy the view of the sea. And seafood. 7.5/10

reviews.author: Christian Ki
reviews.text: Not a great place for swimming but seafood and a day out on the beach is nice

reviews.author: Lucy Nguyen
reviews.text: The beach is completely dirty and it shouldn't be the tourist destination

reviews.author: Tien Tr
reviews.text: Dirty. If this is clean this will be a great place
